name: Baked Bay Scallops
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup white wine or sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together butter, breadcrumbs, garlic, minced onion, parsley, wine, lemon juice, and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Form into rolls and wrap with waxed paper. Chill until firm, at least 1 hour.
3. Preheat oven to 450°F.
4. Grease a shallow baking dish.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat until it begins to foam. Add diced onion and sauté until soft but not browned.
6. Add scallops and mushrooms and season with salt and pepper, then sauté briefly.
7. Drain off excess liquid.
8. Arrange the scallop mixture in the prepared dish.
9. Slice garlic butter and arrange evenly over the scallops.
10. Bake until the butter is hot and bubbly, 5-10 minutes.
11. Serve immediately. Scallops can also be broiled: Place about 3 inches from the heat and broil until bubbly, 3-5 minutes.
